overview:
## Return Value

A new, independent random source.

## Discussion

Calling this method seeds the random source with a sequence of bytes sampled from a high-entropy system source. To later replicate the sequence of numbers generated by this source, read the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKMersenneTwisterRandomSource/seed] property and use the resulting value to initialize another random source with the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKMersenneTwisterRandomSource/init(seed:)] initializer.

For more information, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/GameplayKit_Guide/index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015172].

# init()

**Initializer**

Initializes a random source from a nondeterministic seed.

## Declaration

```swift
convenience init()
```

## Return Value

A new, independent random source.

## Discussion

Calling this method seeds the random source with a sequence of bytes sampled from a high-entropy system source. To later replicate the sequence of numbers generated by this source, read the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKMersenneTwisterRandomSource/seed] property and use the resulting value to initialize another random source with the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKMersenneTwisterRandomSource/init(seed:)] initializer.

For more information, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/GameplayKit_Guide/index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015172].

## Creating a Random Source

- **init(seed:)**: Initializes a random source with the specified seed value.
